segments.text: Seven-year-old at a shelter clinic after flood cleanup.
Child cannot keep fluids down, is lethargic, has a very dry mouth, and has no urine since morning.
Temperature and blood pressure are missing.
Supplies include oral rehydration solution, radio, and transport team.
